violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Per PIC, establishment ran out of chlorine sanitizer and was in process of acquiring additional sanitizer. PIC acquired sanitizer during the time of inspection and was tested at 100 ppm. All dishes and utensils that were previously washed were sanitized during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025
The drain of the 3-bay sink was observed leaking into a bucket and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
